---
title: "Talks and Media"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Talks and media | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Webinar, talks and conference materials by Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Talks and media</p><h1>Webinars and research presentations</h1><p class="lead">Selected public talks, webinars and approved conference information.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell split-grid"><div><p class="eyebrow">Featured webinar · 4 November 2025</p><h2 class="page-section-title">Introduction to the Discrete Choice Experiment as an evaluation tool for rare disease activities</h2><p>The webinar introduces discrete choice experiments and their use in evaluating activities in rare disease settings.</p><p><a href="https://youtu.be/HO2qXJp-BFs?si=T820z7ajkOt3wHaN" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Watch on YouTube ↗</a></p><p class="muted">The privacy-enhanced player loads only after you press play.</p></div><div class="youtube-placeholder" data-youtube-id="HO2qXJp-BFs" data-youtube-title="Introduction to the Discrete Choice Experiment as an evaluation tool for rare disease activities"><button type="button">▶ Play webinar</button></div></div></section>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Selected presentations</h2><ul class="timeline-list"><li><div class="meta">July 2026 · Upcoming presentation</div><h3>International Conference on Choice Modelling</h3><p>Paper 110: eye-tracking discrete choice experiment.</p></li><li><div class="meta">October 2026 · Upcoming podium</div><h3>International Academy of Health Preference Research</h3><p>Dementia support programmes discrete choice experiment.</p></li><li><div class="meta">June 2026 · Recent presentation</div><h3>CDIC 2026</h3><p>Vaccine mandate and public-policy preference research.</p></li><li><div class="meta">May 2026 · Recent poster</div><h3>ISPOR 2026</h3><p>Preference and equity research in type 2 diabetes.</p></li></ul><p><a href="/conferences/">Conference page →</a></p></div></section>
```
